name: Commisso's Chicken Noodle Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/8 tsp thyme leaves, dried and crushed
1 cup cooked egg noodles (from 1 cup uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine the broth, water, celery, carrot, onion, parsley, poultry seasoning, and thyme.
2. Heat over medium heat until boiling, stirring occasionally.
3. Reduce heat to low and cover. Cook for 20 minutes or until vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the cooked chicken and noodles; heat through, stirring occasionally.
Serving Size: Makes about 7 cups or 4 main-dish servings.
